g.onclick: sendPrompt('What ports should a load balancer accept from the internet?')
sendPrompt('What inbound rules should a load balancer security group have?')
sendPrompt('What inbound rules should an app server security group have?')
g.text: inbound: 8080 from load-balancer-sg | outbound: 5432 to db-sg

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What inbound rules should a database security group have?')
g.text: inbound: 5432 from app-server-sg only | outbound: all (default)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why should only the app server be able to reach the database?')
